subcodes.first_line: The Spirit beareth witness: The Light hath come, and sovereignty belongeth unto God, the Mighty, the All-Wise. The Revelation testifieth: The All-Merciful hath appeared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الروح قد اتی النور و الملک لله العزیز الحکیم شهد البیان قد اتی الرحمن
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation of the Cause (general or uncategorized), @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @station of the Manifestation of God, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
